name: typescript-type
description: Add linearProject optional field to ProjectConfig in types.ts

name: init-help-text
description: Update help text in init-project.sh to include --linear-project flag

name: init-project-create-reuse
description: Auto-create or reuse Linear Project in init-project.sh (with warning on failure)

name: init-write-config
description: Write linearProject to projects.json in init-project.sh registration step

name: init-summary-output
description: Show Linear project name in init-project.sh done output

name: submit-read-config
description: Read linearProject from projects.json in submit.sh

name: submit-project-flag
description: Pass --project flag to lineark issues create in submit.sh

name: submit-success-output
description: Show Linear project in submit.sh success output

name: backward-compat
description: Entries without linearProject work exactly as before (no errors)
